title: [HWToBTOR2] Strengthen multi-clocking detection
body: Previously we would only produce multi-clocking errors when multiple seq.clocks were cast to i1s (I assume to make sure that we didn't have multiple sv.always conditions) - this tightens up the restrictions on clocking across registers and sv.always ops, and as a side-effect also catches some extra sv.always divergent cases and lets us use seq.from_clock results a bit more freely
